narration: Trillions of neutrinos are streaming through your body right now.
visual_description: Hook visual: Trillions of neutrinos are streaming through your body right now.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Trillions of neutrinos are streaming through your body right now.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Trillions of neutrinos are streaming through your body right now.

narration: These ghostly particles are so small, they rarely interact with anything.
visual_description: Context visual: These ghostly particles are so small, they rarely interact with anything.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: These ghostly particles are so small, they rarely interact with anything.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: These ghostly particles are so small, they rarely interact with anything.

narration: Neutrinos are born from the sun, cosmic rays, and even nuclear reactions on Earth.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Neutrinos are born from the sun, cosmic rays, and even nuclear reactions on Earth.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Neutrinos are born from the sun, cosmic rays, and even nuclear reactions on Earth.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Neutrinos are born from the sun, cosmic rays, and even nuclear reactions on Earth.

narration: Billions of them pass through every square inch of your body every second—without you even noticing.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Billions of them pass through every square inch of your body every second—without you even noticing.

ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Billions of them pass through every square inch of your body every second—without you even noticing.

narration: Their weak interaction means they can travel through planets like they’re nothing.
